zh.lifeSummary: Marcy Smythe於1554年10月18日出生在英國賀特福爾黑費爾德。她於1571年5月17日與John Woode在英國賀特福爾黑費爾德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1585年7月19日在英國英格蘭賀特福爾黑費爾德享年30歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Marcy Smythe于1554年10月18日出生在英国賀特福爾黑費爾德。她于1571年5月17日与John Woode在英国賀特福爾黑費爾德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1585年7月19日在英国英格兰賀特福爾黑費爾德享年30岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Smythe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Smith
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name denoting a worker in metal, especially iron, such as a blacksmith or farrier, from Middle English smith ‘smith’ (Old English smith, probably a derivative of smītan ‘to strike, hammer’). Early examples are also found in the Latin form Faber . Metal-working was one of the earliest occupations for which specialist skills were required, and its importance ensured that this term and its equivalents in other languages were the most widespread of all occupational surnames in Europe. Medieval smiths were important not only in making horseshoes, plowshares, and other domestic articles, but above all for their skill in forging swords, other weapons, and armor. This is also the most frequent of all surnames in the US. It is very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below). This surname (in any of the two possible English senses; see also below) is also found in Haiti. See also Smither .

English: from Middle English smithe ‘smithy, forge’ (Old English smiththe). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived in or by a blacksmith's shop, occupational, for someone who worked in one, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Smitha in King's Nympton (Devon). Compare Smithey .
Irish and Scottish: sometimes adopted for Gaelic Mac Gobhann, Irish Mac Gabhann ‘son of the smith’. See McGowan .

nameMeanings.name: Marcy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Often used as a feminine equivalent of Mark , but in fact a feminine form of Marcius, itself a derivative of Marcus . One St Marcia is commemorated in a group with Felix, Luciolus, Fortunatus, and others; another with Zenais, Cyria, and Valeria; and a third with Ariston, Crescentian, Eutychian, Urban, Vitalis, Justus, Felicissimus, Felix, and Symphorosa. None is individually very famous.

variants.name: Marsha
meanings: Phonetic spelling of   Marcia  , associated particularly with the American film star  Marsha Hunt  (  b. 1917 ).

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

en.lifeSummary: Marcy Smythe was born on 18 October 1554, in Therfield, Hertfordshire, England. She married John Woode on 17 May 1571, in Therfield, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 19 July 1585, in Therfield, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 30, and was buried in London, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Marcy Smythe est née le 18 octobre 1554, à Therfield, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Elle a épousé John Woode le 17 mai 1571, à Therfield, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 19 juillet 1585, à Therfield, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 30 ans, et a été enterrée à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Marcy Smythe wurde am 18. Oktober 1554 in Therfield, Hertfordshire, England geboren. Sie hat am 17. Mai 1571 in Therfield, Hertfordshire, England John Woode geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 19. Juli 1585 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Therfield, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in London, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Marcy Smythe è nata il il 18 ottobre 1554 nel Therfield, Hertfordshire, England. Lei sposato John Woode il 17 maggio 1571, nel Therfield, Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 19 luglio 1585, nel Therfield, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 30 anni, e fu sepolta a London, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Marcy Smytheは1554年10月18日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアスエルフィールドで生まれた。1571年5月17日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアスエルフィールドでJohn Woodeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1585年7月19日にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアスエルフィールドで30歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marcy Smythe(은)는 1554년 10월 18일 영국 허트퍼드실르 서르필드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1571년 5월 17일 영국 허트퍼드실르 서르필드에서 John Woode(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1585년 7월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 서르필드에서 30세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Marcy Smythe nasceu em 18 de outubro de 1554, em Therfield, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com John Woode em 17 de maio de 1571, em Therfield, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 19 de julho de 1585, em Therfield, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 30 anos, e foi sepultada em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Marcy Smythe родилась 18 октября 1554 г. в местности тирфиелд, хиртфордшир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Woode 17 мая 1571 г. в местности тирфиелд, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 19 июля 1585 г. в местности тирфиелд, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 30 лет и была похоронена в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия.
